name: White Chocolate Mousse Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. Follow package directions for yellow cake mix. Bake the cake in 1 layer in a 10-inch cake pan. Let the cake cool and set aside.
2. Beat egg yolks and half of the sugar until smooth.
3. Whip the egg whites with an electric mixer on medium speed until stiff peaks form.
4. Gently fold together cooled, melted chocolate, remaining sugar, and whipped egg whites into the yolk mixture until just combined.
5. Mix dissolved gelatin in water. Add to the mixture and gently fold in.
6. Fold in the heavy whipped cream until incorporated.
7. Cut cake into three layers. Place one layer in the bottom of the pan and cover with half the mousse mixture.
8. Place a second layer on top and cover with remaining mousse.
9. Place the third layer on top and refrigerate for 3-4 hours before serving.
10. Ice the cake with whipped cream and garnish with shaved white chocolate.
